1: To configure an agent for file system interaction, an `agent.py` file must be created
3: instantiated within the `tools` list of the `LlmAgent` object. It is crucial to replace
4: `"/path/to/your/folder"` in the `args` list with the absolute path to a directory on the
5: local system that the MCP server can access. This directory will be the root for the file
6: system operations performed by the agent.
